phase: verification (meta-audit of report by 2nd expert team)

corrections.proof: RCE reproduced: with __builtins__=_SANDBOX_BUILTINS injected, `from atlas.backtest import event_simulator; event_simulator.os.getcwd()` succeeded and returned C:\data\works\FX\ATLAS. __import__ allowed in SANDBOX_BUILTINS (sandbox_builtins.py:29); module .os attr is real os, bypasses builtins dict. Stage3 is thread-based (sandbox_runner.py:82-85), no OS process/network isolation.
corrections.note: Single most important finding. Original report's downgrade rationale ('runtime builtins restriction' + 'AI unlikely to write this') is wrong for security: builtins restriction does NOT stop the import path, and probabilistic argument is void under adversarial injection.

corrections.proof: Live .env has OANDA_ENVIRONMENT=live and NO ENV var -> ptrc.py:86 guard (ENV==production) never fires in production. OandaCurrencyConverter never instantiated anywhere. Live EUR_USD strategy ATLAS-2026-0511-059 exists (1 USD-quote among 22 live configs). Real-money risk/exposure/margin computed with frozen USD_JPY=150 on a live non-JPY pair.
corrections.note: Report's 'JPY-dominant so limited harm' missed the live EUR_USD pair AND the structurally non-functional guard.

corrections.proof: model_dump_json silently converts inf->null (data loss): a no-loss strategy's PF becomes null after round-trip, causing L1=PASS(inf escapes pf<0.8) but L2 Tier1=null=FAIL inconsistency. model_dump()+json.dumps() emits invalid 'Infinity' token. L1 PF sub-check confirmed bypassed by inf, though trades>=20 & sharpe>=0.3 still apply (not 'unconditional').
corrections.note: Crash claim was correctly rejected, but inf/None asymmetry + silent null conversion is a real medium-grade inconsistency.

corrections.proof: PTRC approval IS independently tested: test_signal_flow.py:99-141, test_phase3_risk_execution.py:125-134, test_ptrc_rejection.py:77-82 all assert result.approved is True without generate_signal dependency. The xfail only loses redundant coverage in one test, not all PTRC-approval coverage.
corrections.note: Report's 'PTRC approval never validated in CI' was false.

corrections.proof: Exposure rejection IS covered: test_phase3_platform.py:141-174 (per_pair_exposure), test_ptrc_currency.py:66-83 + test_r6_risk_fixes.py:63-82 (total_exposure). Only test_ptrc_rejection.py's docstring is misleading.
corrections.note: Report's 'exposure checks never verified' was over-report; only a docstring/coverage-locality issue remains (low).

corrections.proof: FLAT/close orders bypass PTRC on both LIVE (strategy_slot.py:824 close_trade) and PAPER (strategy_slot.py:1020 submit_with_guard, no evaluate). Misleading log '決済PTRC承認' (line 1014) printed though PTRC never ran. Benign (exposure-reducing only, gated on open_trade_id, cannot open/flip), but the categorical 'no bypass exists' was false; misleading audit log is a minor audit-integrity defect.

confirmed_correct.proof: ScheduledTask FTS_LiveRunners -> start_unified_runner.ps1 -> run_unified.py; watchdog matches only *run_unified*; runbook & ADR 0004 classify main.py as dev/verification. No launcher starts main.py.

confirmed_correct.note: structlog WARNING does log PTRC rejections, but no structured AuditLogger/JSONL audit trail; CLAUDE.md violation real. ptrc.py:176 '# Audit Log記録' comment is misleading (only logger.warning runs).

confirmed_correct.proof: _VIOLATION_RE.search on '未インポート' = None confirmed on .venv python.

confirmed_correct.claim: QT-007 contract test covered by catch-all CI step (downgrade justified)

confirmed_correct.note: Outcome correct; rationale imprecise (latent dedup/serialization keyed on shared cid saved by timestamp granularity + reentrancy guard, not 'design intent').
Top-of-medium; degrades to high if any strategy lacks broker SL or SL gaps through.
Fragile/high-adjacent; holds today via in-process flag checked twice on entry path, but no terminal gateway.halt() backstop in UnifiedRunner.

confirmed_correct.proof: 17/17 indicators max_abs_diff=0.000e+00, NaN positions match, on seed=42 n=500. Scoped to in-process builtins only (report scoped it correctly).
Import-traced: portfolio_analyzer is CLI-only (atlas portfolio-report); Calmar only in 'atlas compare' display. Neither feeds Gate/scorer/convergence/FTS-selection.

verification_value: 2nd team found report UNDER-rated the 2 most serious issues (CSR-001 RCE: critical, RE-001 live FX miscalc: high) and OVER-rated 2 test findings (QT-003, QT-005). Net: report direction-of-error was both ways; corrections material.
